description: Resolves an atproto handle (hostname) to a DID. Does not bi-directionally verify against the DID document (the spec marks that step as optional).

main.description: Look up the DID for a handle hosted by this PDS. Supports both bare handles (e.g. 'alice') and suffixed handles (e.g. 'alice.openfederation.net'); the suffix configured for this PDS is stripped before lookup. Returns HandleNotFound if no user or community on this PDS claims the handle.

errors.name: HandleNotFound
errors.description: No user or community on this PDS has the given handle.
